_doc: Contract<->code regions for the conform gate. EMPTY by default = inert. Fill 'regions' with your project's contract(header)/code(source) pairs. 'expect' = known public symbols the extractor MUST recover (sanity gate: an empty parse can't masquerade as 'drift 0'). Paths are relative to the project root. The bundled extractor is C; for another language, replace extract() in check.py.
